name: Periodic Table Info
tagline: This program displays all of the elements in the Periodic Table and will give you more information on one when you select it. Written in Python to be used as a learning tool.
body:
# Periodic Table Info

#### **WARNING:** This project is still in development and is not complete yet! Expected release date is the end of September 2016.

Run this program from the Python Module (IDLE) and you will see a list of all the elements on the Periodic Table display on the screen. Type the name of the one you would like to learn more about on the input line and all the information you'll ever want to know displays for easy viewing! This app was developed for education. To be a reference to, and also teach people about The Periodic Table. It has now branched out to become a piece of software for anybody who want to learn about the Periodic Table or have a reference to the Periodic Table on their computer that they can use anytime!


## Features

* Displays all of the elements in the Periodic Table
* Displays even more detailed (but easy to read) information once you choose one. 
* Displays all this information from top sources like Wikipedia, and Basher.
* Displays the information in a clean and easy to read interface. Making it easy for children.


## Purpose

This project was originally developed for use in education, to make school aged children Periodic Table Wiz Kids. It has since been modified to be used by anyone who need a quick and easy reference to the Periodic Table and its Elements and wants to become a Periodic Table Wiz.


## Contributors

* @willtheorangeguy
* Wikipedia
* Basher


## Installation

If you have any problems installing the software, contact us over at the [Issues page](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/issues).

### Through the Python Module

* Download the Python Module if you haven't already: [Download Link](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.5.2/python-3.5.2-amd64.exe),and install it,
* Extract the file from you GitHub Download,
* Open the main.py file in the Python Module (IDLE),
* And the app will open for you to use!


## Use Instructions

After opening the app, read through the list of Periodic Table Elements and find the one you want to learn more about. 


Type the name of that element at the bottom on the input line where it says: "Please enter the name of the element you would like to learn more about:". It does not matter how you type it in, as long is their is no punctuation, because the app automatically converts the input to lowercase.


After typing the name in successfully (the app will let you know if you don't), the app will display more information about the element you are trying to research.

Some of the information that it will display is as follows:

* The name of the element,
* A small, but detailed description of the element, 
* The elements number,
* Its symbol,
* Atomic number,
* Atomic weight,
* Color,
* and much more!


After learning about one element you can search again to learn about many of the elements or maybe even become a Periodic Table Element wiz!


## Releases

#### **WARNING:** This project is still in development and is not complete yet! Expected release date is the end of September 2016.


The most stable release is version 0.1. Version 0.1 was the initial beta release of the Periodic Table Info app. This release is not yet complete. The next release, version 1.0 is coming out soon with updates to what we have been working on so far, and:

* All of the Periodic Table Elements
* All of the Periodic Table Elements' descriptions
* The finished product

Sending a [pull request](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/pulls) for new features you want to implement and bugs you want to help fix are always welcome. Creating a [new issue](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/issues) for a new feature is always welcome too. Look to see you contributions in feature updates.


## Bugs and Issues
Who likes bugs in their software? (We don’t think anybody does! 😉) That’s why we try hard to make sure that there are no bugs in our software, but sometimes a few slip through the system. If you have found any, feel free to let us know on the [Issues page](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/issues)! We will try to have these issues fixed as soon as possible.
**Note:** Please check the known issues list below before posting an issue to see if your issue is already on the list!

* There are currently no issues.


## License
This software has been released as open source under the GNU General Public License. 

You can view the license in [LICESE/md](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/blob/master/LICENSE) file in this projects repository.

By using this software, you agree to this license. Please adhere to this license when using, distributing, and making changes to the software.


## Other Links
Visit these other links to learn more about the Periodic Table Info app.

The [Latest Version Download](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/archive/v0.1-beta.zip), [Issues Page](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/issues), [Pull Request Page](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/pulls), [Wiki](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/wiki), and [Documentation](https://github.com/Dog-Face-Development/Periodic-Table-Info/blob/master/README.md)
